arts.ttl: 'Happy' - Erik ten Hag gives update on Rasmus Hojlund ahead of Manchester United vs Porto
arts.sum: Man Utd play FC Porto in the Europa League on Thursday and Erik ten Hag spoke ahead of kick-off.

arts.ttl: 'Can't do this' - Erik ten Hag hits back at Benni McCarthy claims he lacks passion at Man United
arts.sum: Former Man United coach Benni McCarthy claimed Ten Hag lacks the 'passion and desire' needed to manage in modern football.

arts.ttl: Man Utd braced for 'massive' transfer for frustrated star
arts.sum: Garnacho has found himself on the bench for three of United’s six Premier League games this season despite his two goal contributions being the joint-most of any player in Erik ten Hag’s squad. According to The Sun, Garnacho’s stop-start game time has led to Barcelona and Juventus taking interest in the 20-year-old, with both clubs monitoring him with the view of making a ‘massive’ bid to United next summer.

arts.ttl: Why Kobbie Mainoo isn't playing for Man Utd vs Porto despite training ahead of match
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag hoped to have Kobbie Mainoo available for Manchester United's Europa League clash with Porto but the midfielder hasn't been able to recover from an injury which he sustained against Tottenham

arts.ttl: Who is Dan Gore? Manchester United youngster named in Europa League squad vs FC Porto
arts.sum: Academy graduate Dan Gore headed to Portugal with Man United as they continue their Europa League charge.

arts.ttl: Top six Premier League manager is an option to replace Erik ten Hag at Man United
arts.sum: The coming days are crucial for the future of Erik ten Hag at Man United as the Dutch coach looks to hold on to his role as manager at Old Trafford but should the Manchester club decide to make a change, Fulham’s Marco Silva is believed to be an option. Man United have made an […] The post Top six Premier League manager is an option to replace Erik ten Hag at Man United appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'No top European club would want a single Man Utd player - that's where they're at'
arts.sum: Ex-Manchester United assistant Rene Meulensteen has torn into the calibre of player at Old Trafford as he claimed no elite European outfit would take a single one of their individuals

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag and Man United claim made as Unai Emery and Aston Villa pile on pressure
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news and opinion as Aston Villa came out as 1-0 winners over Bayern Munich in the Champions League on Wednesday night ahead of the Premier League clash against United.

arts.ttl: Furious Man Utd fans miss Porto clash as flight cancelled after 10-hour airport wait
arts.sum: A host of Manchester United fans have seen their Porto travel plans ruined as their early morning flights was originally delayed for hours before it was cancelled in the afternoon

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: European heavyweights 'eyeing £50m Alejandro Garnacho move'
arts.sum: Barcelona and Juventus could reportedly move for Manchester United attacker Alejandro Garnacho during next summer's transfer window.
